title: Junior Business Development Manager at Supertech

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Supertech
jsonLd.description:
Supertech has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supertech:
Supertech is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supertech!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
